description_long: This object depicts a small suburban neighborhood block featuring multiple detached houses arranged along intersecting streets. The houses vary in architectural style, with most being two to three stories tall, and are set on individual grassy lots with driveways, garages, and small yards. The block is bordered by a sandy beach and a body of water on one side, suggesting a coastal or lakeside setting. The houses have a mix of gable and hip roofs, with some featuring porches, balconies, and visible stairways. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, and the facades display a range of neutral colors such as gray, beige, and brown. The streets are paved, and the overall layout is organized, evoking a planned residential community.
description: A detailed suburban neighborhood block with multiple detached houses, grassy lots, driveways, and a beachside border. The houses feature varied roof styles, porches, and a mix of neutral exterior colors.
description_view_0: This view shows the neighborhood from the street side, highlighting the front facades, driveways, and main entryways of the houses.
description_view_1: This view presents the block from the rear, revealing backyards, garages, and the proximity to the sandy beach and water.
description_view_2: This view faces the beach, displaying the rear elevations of the houses and the transition from grassy lots to sand and water.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the depth of the lots, the arrangement of houses along the street, and the beach extending along one edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature porches or steps, some with columns or overhangs, and a variety of door styles.
